name: volcano
description: Volcano setup and canonical agent instructions for Claude Desktop.
long_description: A lightweight Claude Desktop extension that exposes Volcano setup guidance and canonical agent instructions. It does not implement the full Volcano MCP action surface yet.

tools.name: volcano_setup_instructions
tools.description: Return the canonical command for installing or refreshing Volcano CLI, AGENTS.md, and skills.

tools.name: volcano_agent_instructions
tools.description: Return the canonical Volcano agent instructions from this extension's skills submodule.

tools.name: volcano_skill_index
tools.description: List the canonical Volcano skills included via the skills submodule.

web_url.title: Volcano Web URL
web_url.description: Origin for Volcano bootstrap/docs/skills. Use http://localhost:3000 for local Volcano web development.
